MINUTES FOR FEB-18-2003 9:45 AM FOR DEPT 502

FOR COURT TRIAL - THE CASE SETTLED. THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT WERE PUT ON THE RECORD:1. THE RENTAL/LEASE AGREEMENT IS FORFIEITED OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1168 OAKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO;2. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $1824 FOR BACK RENT AND DEFENDANT WILL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $100 A MONTH TO THE PLAINTIFF COMMENCING MARCH 17, 2003;3. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY AND ALL RIGHTS TO A NOTICED MOTION AND.OR RIGHT TO A HEARING ON THE ENTRY OF A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THIS STIPULATION; AND 4. ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT HELD BY PLAINTIFF.THE COURT SIGNED STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT IN WRITTEN COURT. (502 JUDGE C. MITCHELL; REPORTER: PATTY LEE HUBBLE; CLERK: LINDA ESPY)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL HALLOWS ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, SHERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1168 OAKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO $1,824.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,824.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
